audit_items.proof_trace: All callers (ur_string_map_put, ur_string_map_get, ur_string_map_del) immediately dereference return value with slh->list without NULL checks as required by property. While NULL return is unlikely under normal conditions, defensive programming mandates these checks.
audit_items.attack_scenario: If get_string_list_header somehow returns NULL due to memory corruption or future code changes, immediate dereference causes segmentation fault in TURN server leading to denial of service.
